# Phase-3 S3 input goldens — cursor contexts, resolved actions, the mutations they
# produce, the selection machine, the clipboard, and the FX-helper grid.
# Generated by P3InputGoldenTest from the REAL Kotlin input layer. tools/ptinput
# re-parses each line's inputs, recomputes the RHS in C++ (native/ui/*.h), byte-compares.
# format: <KIND> <inputs...> => <outputs...>   — hex bytes 2-digit UPPER, ints decimal.
# ctx=<TYPE>|<caps>|<cur>|<min>|<max>|<small>|<large>|<empty>|<fxSlot>|<default or ->
# caps, in declaration order: + canIncrement, - canDecrement, > fast+, < fast-,
#                            D canDelete, I canInsert, C canCreate, E isEmpty

# PHRASE — 10 columns (0 = the read-only step gutter) x the step ladder x 5 buttons.

# SONG — the column IS the track and it is 1-based; the cell lives in a growing list.

EDIT scr=TABLE col=8 trow=00:-1:00/00:08/FF:00/00 btn=A => ctx=HEX_BYTE|+-><....|0|0|255|1|16|-1|0|- act=SET:1 trow=00:-1:00/00:08/FF:00/01
EDIT scr=TABLE col=8 trow=00:-1:00/00:08/FF:00/00 btn=B => ctx=HEX_BYTE|+-><....|0|0|255|1|16|-1|0|- act=SET:255 trow=00:-1:00/00:08/FF:00/FF
EDIT scr=TABLE col=8 trow=00:-1:00/00:08/FF:00/00 btn=AL => ctx=HEX_BYTE|+-><....|0|0|255|1|16|-1|0|- act=SET:240 trow=00:-1:00/00:08/FF:00/F0

# GROOVE — one editable column; −1 is the end-of-pattern marker, not a tick count.
EDIT scr=GROOVE col=0 grow=-1 btn=A => ctx=READ_ONLY|........|0|0|255|1|16|255|0|- act=NONE grow=-1
EDIT scr=GROOVE col=0 grow=-1 btn=B => ctx=READ_ONLY|........|0|0|255|1|16|255|0|- act=NONE grow=-1

# SEL — the L+B multi-tap machine. F = a tap inside the 500ms window, S = outside it.
SEL scr=PHRASE cur=3,4 max=9,15 script=LB:F => scope=CELL active=1 start=3,4 end=3,4 bounds=3,4-3,4 info=SEL:CELL
SEL scr=PHRASE cur=3,4 max=9,15 script=LB:F,LB:F => scope=ROW active=1 start=3,1 end=3,9 bounds=3,1-3,9 info=SEL:ROW
SEL scr=PHRASE cur=3,4 max=9,15 script=LB:F,LB:F,LB:F => scope=SCREEN active=1 start=0,1 end=15,9 bounds=0,1-15,9 info=SEL:ALL
SEL scr=PHRASE cur=3,4 max=9,15 script=LB:F,LB:F,LB:F,LB:F => scope=CELL active=1 start=3,4 end=3,4 bounds=3,4-3,4 info=SEL:CELL
SEL scr=PHRASE cur=3,4 max=9,15 script=LB:F,LB:S => scope=NONE active=0 start=- end=- bounds=- info=-
SEL scr=PHRASE cur=3,4 max=9,15 script=LB:F,LB:S,LB:F => scope=CELL active=1 start=3,4 end=3,4 bounds=3,4-3,4 info=SEL:CELL
SEL scr=PHRASE cur=3,4 max=9,15 script=LB:F,E:DOWN => scope=CELL active=1 start=3,4 end=4,4 bounds=3,4-4,4 info=SEL:CELL
SEL scr=PHRASE cur=3,4 max=9,15 script=LB:F,E:DOWN,E:DOWN,E:RIGHT => scope=CELL active=1 start=3,4 end=5,5 bounds=3,4-5,5 info=SEL:CELL
SEL scr=PHRASE cur=3,4 max=9,15 script=LB:F,E:UP => scope=CELL active=1 start=3,4 end=2,4 bounds=2,4-3,4 info=SEL:CELL
SEL scr=PHRASE cur=3,4 max=9,15 script=LB:F,E:LEFT => scope=CELL active=1 start=3,4 end=3,3 bounds=3,3-3,4 info=SEL:CELL
SEL scr=PHRASE cur=3,4 max=9,15 script=LB:F,E:RIGHT,E:RIGHT,E:RIGHT,E:RIGHT,E:RIGHT,E:RIGHT,E:RIGHT,E:RIGHT,E:RIGHT,E:RIGHT => scope=CELL active=1 start=3,4 end=3,9 bounds=3,4-3,9 info=SEL:CELL
SEL scr=PHRASE cur=3,4 max=9,15 script=LB:F,LB:F,E:DOWN => scope=ROW active=1 start=3,1 end=4,9 bounds=3,1-4,9 info=SEL:ROW
SEL scr=PHRASE cur=3,4 max=9,15 script=LB:F,LB:F,LB:F,E:DOWN => scope=SCREEN active=1 start=0,1 end=15,9 bounds=0,1-15,9 info=SEL:ALL
SEL scr=PHRASE cur=3,4 max=9,15 script=LB:F,X => scope=NONE active=0 start=- end=- bounds=- info=-
SEL scr=PHRASE cur=3,4 max=9,15 script=LB:F,E:DOWN,X,E:DOWN => scope=NONE active=0 start=- end=- bounds=- info=-
SEL scr=PHRASE cur=3,4 max=9,15 script=E:DOWN => scope=NONE active=0 start=- end=- bounds=- info=-
SEL scr=CHAIN cur=5,2 max=2,15 script=LB:F => scope=CELL active=1 start=5,2 end=5,2 bounds=5,2-5,2 info=SEL:CELL
SEL scr=CHAIN cur=5,2 max=2,15 script=LB:F,LB:F => scope=ROW active=1 start=5,1 end=5,2 bounds=5,1-5,2 info=SEL:ROW
SEL scr=CHAIN cur=5,2 max=2,15 script=LB:F,LB:F,LB:F => scope=SCREEN active=1 start=0,1 end=15,2 bounds=0,1-15,2 info=SEL:ALL

SEL scr=CHAIN cur=5,2 max=2,15 script=LB:F,LB:S => scope=NONE active=0 start=- end=- bounds=- info=-
SEL scr=CHAIN cur=5,2 max=2,15 script=LB:F,LB:S,LB:F => scope=CELL active=1 start=5,2 end=5,2 bounds=5,2-5,2 info=SEL:CELL
SEL scr=CHAIN cur=5,2 max=2,15 script=LB:F,E:DOWN => scope=CELL active=1 start=5,2 end=6,2 bounds=5,2-6,2 info=SEL:CELL
SEL scr=CHAIN cur=5,2 max=2,15 script=LB:F,E:DOWN,E:DOWN,E:RIGHT => scope=CELL active=1 start=5,2 end=7,2 bounds=5,2-7,2 info=SEL:CELL
SEL scr=CHAIN cur=5,2 max=2,15 script=LB:F,E:UP => scope=CELL active=1 start=5,2 end=4,2 bounds=4,2-5,2 info=SEL:CELL
SEL scr=CHAIN cur=5,2 max=2,15 script=LB:F,E:LEFT => scope=CELL active=1 start=5,2 end=5,1 bounds=5,1-5,2 info=SEL:CELL
SEL scr=CHAIN cur=5,2 max=2,15 script=LB:F,E:RIGHT,E:RIGHT,E:RIGHT,E:RIGHT,E:RIGHT,E:RIGHT,E:RIGHT,E:RIGHT,E:RIGHT,E:RIGHT => scope=CELL active=1 start=5,2 end=5,2 bounds=5,2-5,2 info=SEL:CELL
SEL scr=CHAIN cur=5,2 max=2,15 script=LB:F,LB:F,E:DOWN => scope=ROW active=1 start=5,1 end=6,2 bounds=5,1-6,2 info=SEL:ROW
SEL scr=CHAIN cur=5,2 max=2,15 script=LB:F,LB:F,LB:F,E:DOWN => scope=SCREEN active=1 start=0,1 end=15,2 bounds=0,1-15,2 info=SEL:ALL
SEL scr=CHAIN cur=5,2 max=2,15 script=LB:F,X => scope=NONE active=0 start=- end=- bounds=- info=-

SEL scr=CHAIN cur=5,2 max=2,15 script=E:DOWN => scope=NONE active=0 start=- end=- bounds=- info=-

SEL scr=TABLE cur=7,6 max=8,15 script=LB:F,X => scope=NONE active=0 start=- end=- bounds=- info=-

SEL scr=TABLE cur=7,6 max=8,15 script=E:DOWN => scope=NONE active=0 start=- end=- bounds=- info=-

# CLIP — copy/cut/paste/delete. The dump beneath each case is the WHOLE grid after it,
# because a mis-anchored paste writes the right bytes into the wrong cells.
CLIP scr=PHRASE op=copy-paste name=cell src=2,1,2,1 dst=9,1 => SUCCESS:1 info=PHR:1x1
  R00 step=0.2:10:20:03/30:1F/40:16/50
  R01 step=1.2:11:21:03/31:1F/41:16/51
  R02 step=2.2:12:22:03/32:1F/42:16/52
  R03 step=3.2:13:23:03/33:1F/43:16/53
  R04 step=4.2:14:24:03/34:1F/44:16/54
  R05 step=5.2:15:25:03/35:1F/45:16/55
  R06 step=6.2:16:26:03/36:1F/46:16/56
  R07 step=7.2:17:27:03/37:1F/47:16/57
  R08 step=8.2:18:28:03/38:1F/48:16/58
  R09 step=2.2:19:29:03/39:1F/49:16/59
  R10 step=10.2:1A:2A:03/3A:1F/4A:16/5A
  R11 step=11.2:1B:2B:03/3B:1F/4B:16/5B
  R12 step=0.3:1C:2C:03/3C:1F/4C:16/5C

  R05 trow=15:37:14/35:08/45:1D/55
  R06 trow=16:38:14/36:08/46:1D/56
  R07 trow=17:39:14/37:08/47:1D/57
  R08 trow=18:40:14/38:08/48:1D/58
  R09 trow=19:-1:14/39:08/49:1D/59
  R10 trow=1A:42:14/3A:08/4A:1D/5A
  R11 trow=1B:43:14/3B:08/4B:1D/5B
  R12 trow=1C:44:14/3C:08/4C:1D/5C
  R13 trow=1D:45:14/3D:08/4D:1D/5D
  R14 trow=1E:-1:14/3E:08/4E:1D/5E
  R15 trow=1F:47:14/3F:08/4F:1D/5F
CLIP scr=TABLE op=copy-paste name=fxpair src=0,3,2,4 dst=4,5 => SUCCESS:6 info=TBL:2x3
  R00 trow=10:32:14/30:08/40:1D/50
  R01 trow=11:33:14/31:08/41:1D/51
  R02 trow=12:34:14/32:08/42:1D/52
  R03 trow=13:35:14/33:08/43:1D/53

  R12 trow=1C:44:14/3C:08/4C:1D/5C

  R14 trow=1E:-1:14/3E:08/4E:1D/5E
  R15 trow=1F:47:14/3F:08/4F:1D/5F

  R00 trow=10:32:14/30:08/40:1D/50
  R01 trow=00:-1:00/00:00/00:00/00
  R02 trow=00:-1:00/00:00/00:00/00
  R03 trow=00:-1:00/00:00/00:00/00

CLIP scr=TABLE op=cut-paste name=roundtrip src=0,1,2,8 dst=6,1 => SUCCESS:24 info=TBL:8x3
  R00 trow=00:-1:00/00:00/00:00/00
  R01 trow=00:-1:00/00:00/00:00/00
  R02 trow=00:-1:00/00:00/00:00/00
  R03 trow=13:35:14/33:08/43:1D/53
  R04 trow=14:-1:14/34:08/44:1D/54
  R05 trow=15:37:14/35:08/45:1D/55
  R06 trow=10:32:14/30:08/40:1D/50
  R07 trow=11:33:14/31:08/41:1D/51
  R08 trow=12:34:14/32:08/42:1D/52
  R09 trow=19:-1:14/39:08/49:1D/59
  R10 trow=1A:42:14/3A:08/4A:1D/5A
  R11 trow=1B:43:14/3B:08/4B:1D/5B

  R15 trow=1F:47:14/3F:08/4F:1D/5F

# FXH — the 6x5 grid. Its last row is CENTRED (cols 1..4); cols 0 and 5 there are
# empty and unreachable, and every move that could land on them rounds inward.
FXH open=0 moves=- => row=0 col=0 idx=0 code=00
FXH open=0 moves=U => row=4 col=1 idx=24 code=20
FXH open=0 moves=D => row=1 col=0 idx=6 code=09
FXH open=0 moves=L => row=0 col=5 idx=5 code=08
FXH open=0 moves=R => row=0 col=1 idx=1 code=03
FXH open=0 moves=U,U => row=3 col=1 idx=19 code=1C
FXH open=0 moves=D,D => row=2 col=0 idx=12 code=12
FXH open=0 moves=L,L => row=0 col=4 idx=4 code=07
FXH open=0 moves=R,R => row=0 col=2 idx=2 code=04
FXH open=0 moves=D,D,D,D => row=4 col=1 idx=24 code=20
FXH open=0 moves=D,D,D,D,L => row=4 col=4 idx=27 code=24
FXH open=0 moves=D,D,D,D,R,R,R,R => row=4 col=1 idx=24 code=20
FXH open=0 moves=U,L => row=4 col=4 idx=27 code=24
FXH open=0 moves=U,R,R,R,R,R => row=4 col=2 idx=25 code=21
FXH open=0 moves=D,D,D,D,U => row=3 col=1 idx=19 code=1C
FXH open=0 moves=D,D,D,D,D => row=0 col=1 idx=1 code=03
FXH open=0 moves=R,R,R,R,R,R => row=0 col=0 idx=0 code=00
FXH open=1 moves=- => row=0 col=1 idx=1 code=03
FXH open=1 moves=U => row=4 col=1 idx=24 code=20
FXH open=1 moves=D => row=1 col=1 idx=7 code=0A
FXH open=1 moves=L => row=0 col=0 idx=0 code=00
FXH open=1 moves=R => row=0 col=2 idx=2 code=04
FXH open=1 moves=U,U => row=3 col=1 idx=19 code=1C
FXH open=1 moves=D,D => row=2 col=1 idx=13 code=14
FXH open=1 moves=L,L => row=0 col=5 idx=5 code=08
FXH open=1 moves=R,R => row=0 col=3 idx=3 code=05
FXH open=1 moves=D,D,D,D => row=4 col=1 idx=24 code=20
FXH open=1 moves=D,D,D,D,L => row=4 col=4 idx=27 code=24
FXH open=1 moves=D,D,D,D,R,R,R,R => row=4 col=1 idx=24 code=20
FXH open=1 moves=U,L => row=4 col=4 idx=27 code=24
FXH open=1 moves=U,R,R,R,R,R => row=4 col=2 idx=25 code=21
FXH open=1 moves=D,D,D,D,U => row=3 col=1 idx=19 code=1C
FXH open=1 moves=D,D,D,D,D => row=0 col=1 idx=1 code=03
FXH open=1 moves=R,R,R,R,R,R => row=0 col=1 idx=1 code=03
FXH open=5 moves=- => row=0 col=5 idx=5 code=08
FXH open=5 moves=U => row=4 col=4 idx=27 code=24
FXH open=5 moves=D => row=1 col=5 idx=11 code=11
FXH open=5 moves=L => row=0 col=4 idx=4 code=07
FXH open=5 moves=R => row=0 col=0 idx=0 code=00
FXH open=5 moves=U,U => row=3 col=4 idx=22 code=1F
FXH open=5 moves=D,D => row=2 col=5 idx=17 code=1A
FXH open=5 moves=L,L => row=0 col=3 idx=3 code=05
FXH open=5 moves=R,R => row=0 col=1 idx=1 code=03
FXH open=5 moves=D,D,D,D => row=4 col=4 idx=27 code=24
FXH open=5 moves=D,D,D,D,L => row=4 col=3 idx=26 code=23
FXH open=5 moves=D,D,D,D,R,R,R,R => row=4 col=4 idx=27 code=24
FXH open=5 moves=U,L => row=4 col=3 idx=26 code=23
FXH open=5 moves=U,R,R,R,R,R => row=4 col=1 idx=24 code=20
FXH open=5 moves=D,D,D,D,U => row=3 col=4 idx=22 code=1F
FXH open=5 moves=D,D,D,D,D => row=0 col=4 idx=4 code=07
FXH open=5 moves=R,R,R,R,R,R => row=0 col=5 idx=5 code=08
FXH open=6 moves=- => row=1 col=0 idx=6 code=09
FXH open=6 moves=U => row=0 col=0 idx=0 code=00

FXH open=6 moves=U,R,R,R,R,R => row=0 col=5 idx=5 code=08
